# AIM Foundation

> Associated Initiative for Mankind Foundation (AIM Foundation) is a leading NGO in Kolkata dedicated to education, healthcare, women empowerment, environment, and community development for underprivileged communities across India.

## About
- [Organisation](/organisation): Overview of our history and purpose since 2016.
- [Our Profile](/profile): Detailed mission, vision, legal recognitions (80G, 12A, CSR-1, FCRA), and transparency commitment.
- [Our Team](/team): Meet our voluntary Board of Trustees and dedicated Management Committee.

## Initiatives

### Educational Initiatives
- [Educational Initiatives Overview](/educational-initiatives): Empowering children and youth through diverse learning programs.
- [Innocent Smiles](/innocent-smiles): Holistic development combining academics with art, dance, and music.
- [EduAccess](/eduaccess): Expert-led online classes streamed to rural West Bengal.
- [Empower English](/empower-english): Spoken English training to boost student confidence.
- [DigiEmpower](/digiempower): Digital literacy and computer training for Adivasi and underprivileged children.
- [Milieu](/milieu): Inclusive learning sessions uniting children from diverse socio-economic backgrounds.
- [VidyaShakti](/vidyashakti): AI-powered multilingual learning support app for rural students.

### Healthcare Initiatives
- [Healthcare Initiatives Overview](/healthcare-initiatives): Delivering medical services to urban slums and remote villages.
- [CureLine](/cureline): Frontline rural healthcare outreach and mobile medical camps.
- [CareCircle](/carecircle): Collaborative urban health camps across Kolkata.
- [ChildFirst](/childfirst): Specialized health camps for children of sex workers.
- [Detect](/detect): Cervical cancer awareness and screening for rural women.
- [SightHope](/sighthope): Free eye check-ups, spectacles, and cataract surgeries.
- [OralScan](/oralscan): Early detection camps for oral cancer.
- [CycleSafe](/cyclesafe): Promoting menstrual hygiene and reproductive health for girls.
- [SoulCircle](/soulcircle): 24/7 AI-powered compassionate mental health support.

### Sustainability Initiatives
- [Sustainability Initiatives Overview](/sustainability-initiatives): Grassroots environmental protection and restoration.
- [GreenRoots](/green-roots): Decentralized reforestation through sapling distribution.
- [TideShield](/tideshield): Mangrove restoration on Bali Island in the Sundarbans.
- [Roots of Change](/roots-of-change): Environmental education and sustainable habit cultivation.
- [Forest Cleaning](/forest-cleaning): Volunteer-driven drives to remove waste from natural habitats.

### Skill Development
- [Skill Development Overview](/skill-development-initiatives): Vocational training for economic independence.
- [Digital Marketing](/digital-marketing): Free job-oriented digital marketing course.
- [Graphic Design](/graphic-design): Free design training using Canva.
- [Web Development](/web-development): Free no-code WordPress website building course.
- [SuiDhaga](/suidhaga): Tailoring and embroidery skills for women.
- [Krishti](/krishti): Supporting skilled women in launching micro-enterprises.

### Relief & Community Support
- [Relief to the Underprivileged](/relief-to-the-underprivileged): Immediate aid including food, clothing, and shelter.
- [Disaster Management](/disaster-management): Rapid response and recovery support during natural calamities.
- [Ignite Change Initiative](/ignite-change-initiative): Mobilizing grassroots action and supporting local changemakers.

## Services
- [Impact Assessment Services](/impact-assessment-services): Independent third-party evaluation of CSR projects.
- [CSR Reporting](/csr-report): End-to-end reporting solutions for corporate compliance.

## Get Involved
- [Individual Donation](/individual-donation): Support our programs with a one-time or monthly contribution.
- [Corporate Social Responsibility](/corporate-social-responsibility): Strategic partnerships for social impact.
- [Payroll Giving](/payroll-giving): Seamless employee donation programs.
- [Cause-Marketing & Events](/cause-marketing-events): Aligning brands with social causes.

## Join Us
- [Volunteering](/volunteering): Grassroots or virtual opportunities to lend your skills.
- [Internship](/internship): Hands-on experience in the social development sector.
- [Careers](/career): Build a career dedicated to social impact.

## Resources
- [Blog](/blog): Inspiring "Hope Stories" and project updates.
- [Annual Reports](/annual-report): Publicly available financial and impact reports.
- [Policies](/policies): Organizational guidelines on privacy, safeguarding, and transparency.

## Media
- [Gallery](/gallery): Moments of impact captured in images.
- [Films](/films): Short films documenting our mission and stories of change.

## Contact
- [Contact Us](/contact-us): Reach our team via office visit, email, or phone.
